Had a meeting with Alex Chen at the TechCorp office. A new engineer named Jordan Kim was also present.

The agenda was about the next milestone for Sample Project. Alex Chen reported that the auth feature implementation is behind schedule in the current sprint. The cause is a spec change by the OAuth provider.

Jordan Kim is in charge of infrastructure and is planning to start improving the deployment pipeline next month. Speeding up the CI/CD is going to be their first task.

Next meeting is set for next Friday. We agreed on a plan to resolve the auth feature blocker by then.
